sentences.english: My friend and I went to a restaurant.
The waiter brought us a menu.

sentences.uzbek: Men osh va ko'k choy buyurtma qildim.
sentences.english: I ordered plov and green tea.

sentences.uzbek: Osh juda mazali va to'yimli edi.
sentences.english: The plov was very delicious and filling.
At the end I asked for the bill.
